channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Raigad Police and Volunteers Rescue Eight Bus Passengers, Including 72-Year-Old Woman, from Floodwaters
item.description: A rescue operation in Maharashtra's Raigad district ensured the safe evacuation of eight passengers after a state-run ST bus became stranded in floodwaters caused by continuous heavy rainfall. The ope...

item.title: Two men granted bail after police roadblock incident involving blue lights
item.description: Two men, Afzal Abramjee and Manuel Pinto, were granted bail of R10,000 each by the Pretoria magistrate’s court following a police roadblock incident. The case originated from a stop in Wierdabrug on J...

item.title: Paolini's Victory Boosts Confidence in Tennis Match Against Eala
item.description: Jasmine Paolini, the Italian tennis player, showcased renewed confidence after securing a crucial victory against her opponent, Eala, in a recent match. The win marks a significant milestone in her ca...

item.title: Kenya and Gates Foundation Launch 10-Year Plan to Expand Irrigation
item.description: The Kenyan government, in collaboration with the Gates Foundation, has launched an ambitious 10-year plan to expand irrigation by one million acres. This initiative aims to boost food security, create...

item.title: Australians Shift Toward EVs and Hybrids as Sales Reach Half Market Share
item.description: The article highlights a significant shift in Australia's vehicle market, with electric vehicles (EVs) and hybrids now accounting for half of all new car sales. This marks a turning point after years ...

item.title: Two co-accused in P75M plunder case committed to QC Jail
item.description: Sen. Rodante Marcoleta's co-accused, former congressman Mike Defensor and businessman Joseph Varias Espiritu, have been committed to Quezon City Jail after their arrest. The Department of the Interior...

item.title: NSW Labor conference erupts over gambling laws and Middle East conflict
item.description: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese faces internal party tensions at the New South Wales Labor conference, where members protested the federal government's stance on gambling regulations and the Middle Ea...

item.title: NITR Kaduna Faces Administrative Crisis Over Corruption Probe and Alleged Witness Sacking
item.description: A major corruption and administrative crisis is unfolding at the Nigerian Institute for Trypanosomiasis Research (NITR) in Kaduna. Leaked documents reveal that the Director-General (DG), Dr. Joachim J...

item.title: Microsoft Restructures Gaming Division with Major Layoffs and AI Focus
item.description: Microsoft announced significant layoffs across its Xbox and commercial sales divisions, affecting nearly 5,000 employees. The restructuring aims to realign the company with AI-driven strategies and ad...

item.title: KSEB takes action against tariff violations by landlords converting flats into private lodges
item.description: The Kerala State Electricity Board (KSEB) has imposed fines on residents who are renting out their flats as private lodges via booking apps, citing violations of electricity tariff conditions. During ...

item.title: Australian Prime Minister Issues Apology for Comments on Kylie Minogue
item.description: Australian Prime Minister Anthony Albanese has issued an unequivocal apology for making 'inappropriate' remarks about pop icon Kylie Minogue during a recent podcast interview. The comments, which were...

item.title: Canada Simplifies 'Buy Canadian' Procurement Rules to Support Small Businesses
item.description: The Canadian federal government is streamlining its 'Buy Canadian' procurement process to make it easier for small and medium-sized businesses to compete in federal contracts. Minister Joël Lightbound...

item.title: AWS and FlexiSAF's AI Platform Transforms Edtech in Nigeria with 130,000 Students
item.description: FlexiSAF, in partnership with AWS, has launched Distinction.app, an AI-powered edtech platform transforming education in Nigeria. The platform, built on AWS Generative AI models, offers personalized l...

item.title: Kenya Police Disarm Criminal Gang in Eldoret After Late-Night Firefight
item.description: In a daring late-night operation in Uasin Gishu County, Kenya's National Police Service (NPS) engaged in a fierce shootout with six armed suspects suspected of robbing civilians. The clash occurred sh...

item.title: Indian Navy commissions advanced stealth frigate Mahendragiri, enhancing maritime combat capabilities
item.description: The Indian Navy is set to commission its sixth indigenous Project 17A stealth frigate, Mahendragiri (F38), at Visakhapatnam on July 11, 2026. Designed by the Navy’s Warship Design Bureau and built by ...

item.title: Analysis of senator-judges' votes in Sara Duterte's impeachment trial reveals legislative coalitions
item.description: The article discusses the procedural votes by senator-judges during Vice President Sara Duterte's impeachment trial, highlighting how these intermediate decisions reflect underlying political preferen...

item.title: SARS Introduces Enhanced Digital Tools to Improve Tax Compliance and Security
item.description: The South African Revenue Service (SARS) has launched significant digital enhancements to streamline the tax return process, making it simpler, faster, and more secure for taxpayers. Over 1.9 million ...

item.title: Supreme Court Backs Trump's Immigration Policies Despite Birthright Citizenship Concerns
item.description: The U.S. Supreme Court has endorsed significant aspects of former President Donald Trump's immigration policies, including the controversial 'birthright citizenship' debate, despite ongoing legal and ...

item.title: Tanzania and China Discuss Visa-Free Transit for Eligible Travelers
item.description: Tanzania and China are currently in discussions to introduce a pilot visa-free transit arrangement, allowing eligible Tanzanians traveling through China to third countries to enter the Asian nation wi...

item.title: Sara Duterte's Impeachment Trial: Key Developments and Related News
item.description: The article highlights key developments in Vice President Sara Duterte's impeachment trial, including Senator Chiz Escudero setting the conviction threshold at 16 votes. It details the trial's progres...
